column1: Header , icons , bottom navigation , pop ups will be native components
Font - Roboto for hybrid content and SF font native components like titles for ios.
General capabilities to download, view, delete and scan docs
service provider raises a request for docs
Active ones turn into view only after time limit irrespective of their sharing status
Sharing App to app , web to app
Sharing regulations and parameters will be set by service provider
1 issuer can issue different docs ex- Federal authority can issue emirated ID/passport/resident visa etc
I issuing authority can issue multiple docs of same catagory. ex- Interier ministry can isuue multiple vehicle registrations
Issuing some doc might depend on other essential docs. User will notified in case not added.
Single document can be simply requested
User will need to choose the documents they want to request from the tagged list
Document Type will have document instances but SP has specified the one he wants
Document Type will have document instances and SP allows user to select any instance
one to many PREDEFINED Document mapping- mandatory
one to one Document mapping- mandatory
one to many Document mapping- mandatory
If requested by user earlier , document will be automapped
If not requested by user and not available in documents tab ,  error is displayed and clicking chevron takes user to unavailable page with a request button
Requested docs are displayed under doc type in a folder structure (Card within card)

If requested by user earlier , button label says 'Select document'
If not requested by user and not available in documents tab , no error is displayed and button label says ' Add *doc name*
